name: chopmob-cloud/AlgoVoi-Platform-Adapters
description: Multi-chain x402/MPP/AP2 payment gateway MCP. Create hosted USDC checkouts across 7 chains (Algorand, VOI, Hedera, Stellar, Base, Solana, Tempo) from any MCP client. Verifies on-chain settlement (Solana Pay `reference` binding, EVM Transfer-log scans, Algorand memo-bound), generates agent payment challenges. Install: `npx @algovoi/mcp-server` or `uvx algovoi-mcp`.
